title: 4/27〜5/1 Weekly Market Report

top5_themes.theme: サイバーセキュリティ

bot5_themes.theme: 資源（水素・ヘリウム・水）

report:
## Market Overview (Week of Apr 27–May 1, GW Holiday Week)

A shortened trading week due to Golden Week. 42 of 67 themes (63%) advanced, average return +2.31%. Capital concentrating heavily in AI-related themes — particularly SaaS and Generative AI.

---

## Rising Themes

### 🥇 #1: SaaS (+12.1%)
Strong earnings from MoneyForward and Sansan. US rate cut expectations supported growth stocks broadly.

### 🥈 #2: Generative AI (+10.8%)
SoftBank Group announced expanded AI investment and deepened OpenAI ties, drawing large inflows from AI-focused funds.

### 🥉 #3: Cybersecurity (+9.2%)
Wave of reported cyberattacks on Japanese corporations drove security demand higher. GMO Cybersecurity and Digital Arts hit year-to-date highs.

### #4: Edge AI (+8.6%) / #5: AI Semiconductor (+7.4%)
Distributed AI processing trend accelerated. Edge and embedded AI demand surging.

---

## Falling Themes

Energy themes (Oil & Gas, LNG) declined as Middle East risk premiums eased. Retail & E-Commerce pulled back on profit-taking.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

Capital rotated clearly into high-growth AI themes during the holiday lull. SaaS earnings beats + SoftBank AI commitment = strong confirmation signal. Momentum shifted to 'Accelerating' for both Generative AI and SaaS.

> **Disclaimer**: For informational purposes only. All investment decisions are your sole responsibility.
